regime_reason: Trump declared the US-Iran ceasefire memorandum 'over', sending oil up over 5% (WTI above $74) and futures down sharply (Dow -~600pts, S&P -0.8%, Nasdaq -1.3%) with VIX jumping 8.4% to 17.49, reversing yesterday's record-high risk-on tape.

watchlist.note: Transocean signed a $1B+ multi-rig contract with Equinor on 2026-06-30; pending Valaris merger and Aug 5 earnings.
Absci: Truist raised PT to $17 on 2026-07-02 after positive Phase 1 ABS-201 data (2026-06-24); stock +47% on the week.
Hudson Technologies: major holder Hartree Partners bought $1.16M on 2026-06-30 and $1.62M more on 2026-07-02.

notes: Held position VMAR (42 sh @ $1.41, day 0/45, stop armed day 2) has no new negative news today beyond the already-flagged reverse split and 7/2 insider sale; recent PRs are routine operational items (patent filing, ECU deliveries, facility moves). Scan candidate PALI looks attractive on FDA/Phase 2 news but carries heavy dilution risk (167M shares out, $300M shelf, 13.95M warrants, authorized shares just raised to 450M) -- added to avoid despite the clinical catalyst. NVVE and SNAL remain in active Nasdaq delisting distress (both did compliance reverse splits this week); SDM was suspended/delisted 6/26 and MCRP/JMG are under exchange or SEC scrutiny.
